hero.title: Divetools
hero.subtitle: Dive Computer for Apple Watch Ultra
hero.tagline: Bühlmann ZHL-16C · Real-time Decompression · Depth Sensor

features.title: Built for Pro Divers
features.subtitle: Every tool for underwater safety, right on your wrist

items.title: Bühlmann ZHL-16C
items.desc: Industry-standard decompression algorithm with adjustable GF. Real-time GF99, SurfGF, and CNS tracking.

items.title: Real-time Depth Sensor
items.desc: 0.1m precision via Apple Watch Ultra pressure sensor. Supports depths up to 40m.

items.title: Gas Management
items.desc: Up to 4 gas mixes including EAN32, EAN36. Automatic ppO₂, MOD, and OTU calculation.

items.title: Freediving Mode
items.desc: Auto dive detection, surface interval timer, and max depth recording.

items.title: Safety Alerts
items.desc: Real-time warnings for ascent rate, ceiling violation, CNS, and OTU. 6-level haptic feedback.

items.title: iPhone Companion App
items.desc: Review dive logs, depth profile graphs, and sync settings wirelessly.

screenshots.title: Dive Computer on Your Wrist
screenshots.subtitle: 4-zone adaptive dive display, optimized for Apple Watch Ultra

items.title: iPhone + iOS 17 or later
items.desc: For companion app and settings sync

footer.disclaimer: Divetools is not a replacement for PADI/SSI certified dive computers. Always dive with certified equipment.
